_meta.title: Soldut — Smoke test (prompt-only, no ControlNet, no IP-Adapter)
_meta.description: Fastest possible end-to-end test: SDXL prompt-to-image at 768x768, 18 steps. Validates the comfy server / model loads / VAE / save path without the slow ControlNet+IPAdapter chain. Used to pin down 'is the pipeline fundamentally working' before adding back the slow nodes.
